user.title: Connect to gSender
user.description: Enable Remote Mode in gSender (Config -> Remote Mode) first and enter the IP/port shown there. The serial port path (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0) must match the port gSender's main app is already connected to.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure gSender
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details. Useful when the gSender PC got a new IP address or the CNC moved to a different serial port.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to gSender's remote server. Check that Remote Mode is enabled and the IP/port are correct.

abort.already_configured: This gSender instance is already configured.
